papers_mined.title: Spider's tactile hairs (Scholarpedia)
papers_mined.note: Trichobothria on tarsus/metatarsus/tibia; hair length 100-1400 μm; tuned to 40-600 Hz depending on hair length.

papers_mined.title: Dynamics arthropod filiform hairs V (PMC)
papers_mined.note: Phasic response to deflection speed; broadly tuned 50-100 Hz baseline range; individual hairs tuned by length.

papers_mined.title: Mechanical properties spider trichobothria Cupiennius (Phil Trans B 1993)
papers_mined.note: Mechanical resonance varies with hair length; mass-stiffness ratio determines best frequency.

papers_mined.title: Spider mechanoreceptors (Barth 2004)
papers_mined.note: Comprehensive review of mechanoreceptors; bank-of-filters multiscale receptors.

papers_mined.title: PowerAttention: Exponential Scaling of Receptive Fields (2503.03588)
papers_mined.note: DAG model of receptive field; static sparse attention patterns; exponential RF growth via head composition.

papers_mined.title: Hybrid Attention Optimized Hierarchical Multiscale Transformer (Sci Reports 2026)
papers_mined.note: HMT hybrid attention multiscale architecture for image SR; multi-scale receptive fields.

papers_mined.title: Multi-scale Hierarchical ViT with Cascaded Attention (PMLR 2024)
